untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-timeframe analysis (focus timeframe vs higher timeframe comparison) and range duration detection that cannot be expressed using single-timeframe indicators. Requires: (1) automated detection of 'large trading range after extended trend' pattern, (2) cross-timeframe trend comparison logic, (3) range_duration measurement in bars, (4) focus_to_higher_tf_ratio calculation. These require custom composite indicators or multi-timeframe context not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: This is a sophisticated multi-timeframe continuation strategy ('innocent until proven guilty' approach to ranges). The core logic—consult higher timeframe to distinguish noise from signal—cannot be reliably translated to single-timeframe rule conditions. Provided entry/exit above uses RSI overbought/underextent as a proxy for the intended 'overextended condition' check, but this is an approximation only and does not capture the full intent of higher timeframe validation. Parameters marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] in original signal cannot be determined without author specification.
